text:
My net worth hit $1.2M but on paper.

I spent $1.2M on 11 metaverse plots, including $214K “prime location” land next to virtual Gucci.

Gucci left in 2023 but my plot didn’t. My portfolio dumped from $1.2M to $90K.

I promised myself that I’m not falling for CT again but I did https://t.co/Mq4qgwKC9o

text:
A colleague with augmented reality expertise photoscanned Phoenix, built a 3D model, and turned it into a WebXR experience. You can literally place her in your surroundings and walk around her.
The SpaceX Starlink rocket in the back is a nice touch too 🚀

text:
Meta is pivoting its primary focus from the metaverse and shutting down its flagship ‘Horizon Worlds' platform. This $80 billion shift aims to prioritize high-margin AI infrastructure and long-term corporate stability.

Explore more @ https://t.co/WO8iqChJmz
